headline: Raymond James Lifts PT on Flywire Corporation (FLYW)
summary: Flywire Corporation (NASDAQ:FLYW) is one of the best small cap stocks to buy for the long term. Raymond James lifted the price target on Flywire Corporation (NASDAQ:FLYW) to $22 from $21 on May 27 and maintained an Outperform rating on the shares, telling investors in a research note that the firm is encouraged by the […]

headline: Is Mechanics Bancorp (MCHB) One of the Ultra-High Dividend Stocks to Buy for Income Investors?
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 19.10%, Mechanics Bancorp (NASDAQ:MCHB) is included among the 12 Ultra-High Dividend Stocks to Buy for Income Investors. On May 29, Raymond James initiated coverage of Mechanics Bancorp (NASDAQ:MCHB) with an Outperform rating and a $17 price target. The firm said the West Coast regional bank has relied heavily on mergers and […]
